observations.text: Index partiel sur archived absent — requetes filtrées AND a.archived=false sans index
observations.correction_prompt: Add to V009: CREATE INDEX idx_bank_accounts_not_archived ON bank_accounts (id) WHERE archived = false;
observations.verdict_reason: Micro-optimisation negligeable pour un foyer de 2-3 utilisateurs

files.note: Migration correcte, DEFAULT FALSE assure retrocompatibilite. Index partiel suggere mais skip.

observations.text: isAtLeast() repose sur ordinal implicite — fragile si l'ordre des constantes change
observations.correction_prompt: Replace ordinal-based comparison with explicit rank field: READ(0), WRITE(1), ADMIN(2).
observations.verdict_reason: Fragilite theorique documentee en Javadoc, projet mono-contributeur, 3 valeurs stables

files.note: Enum propre, isAtLeast() fonctionnel. Ordinal documente explicitement.

observations.text: Retour Object[] non type — cast (Account)row[0] et (AccessLevel)row[1] non verifies a la compilation
observations.correction_prompt: Create AccountWithAccess record, use SELECT new com.prosperity.account.AccountWithAccess(a, aa.accessLevel) FROM ...
observations.verdict_reason: Fix chirurgical, record + JPQL constructor expression contourne le bug Hibernate Optional<Object[]>

files.note: Queries JPQL correctes, pas de N+1. Object[] migre vers AccountWithAccess record. APPLIED.

observations.text: resolveUser() leve RuntimeException generique non interceptee → HTTP 500
observations.correction_prompt: Replace RuntimeException with UserNotFoundException. Add @ExceptionHandler(UserNotFoundException.class) → 404 in AccountController.
observations.verdict_reason: RuntimeException confirmee, produit 500, fix chirurgical UserNotFoundException. APPLIED.

observations.text: setAccess() leve RuntimeException pour userId inconnu → HTTP 500
observations.verdict_reason: Meme pattern que obs-1, reutilise UserNotFoundException. APPLIED.

observations.text: removeAccess() leve RuntimeException + IllegalArgumentException non interceptees → HTTP 500
observations.verdict_reason: Deux cas clients valides retournant 500. APPLIED.

observations.text: setAccess() permet au dernier ADMIN de se retrograder — compte orphelin possible
observations.correction_prompt: Before access.setAccessLevel(), check if ADMIN→non-ADMIN and adminCount<=1, throw IllegalStateException.
observations.verdict_reason: Trou metier confirme, countByBankAccountIdAndAccessLevel existe deja. APPLIED.

observations.text: POST /access pour un upsert — semantique REST ambigue
observations.verdict_reason: Preference stylistique sans impact fonctionnel pour ce contexte

observations.text: Double requete DB pour D-02 — index account_accesses a verifier
observations.verdict_reason: Negligeable pour foyer 2-3 utilisateurs, index UNIQUE(user_id, bank_account_id) couvre les lookups

observations.text: Test manquant: setAccess() retrogradation dernier ADMIN
observations.verdict_reason: Directement lie a obs-4, fix chirurgical 1 test unitaire. APPLIED.

files.note: Logique acces solide (D-02, D-04, D-07). 4 bloquants RuntimeException et faille setAccess last-admin corriges.
Separation HTTP/metier propre. Handlers manquants corriges dans obs-1/2/3 d'AccountService.

observations.text: name='' accepte par @Size(max=100) sans @NotBlank en PATCH — nom de compte vide persiste en base
observations.correction_prompt: Change @Size(max=100) to @Size(min=1, max=100) on name field.
observations.verdict_reason: Bug de donnees confirme, fix d'un parametre d'annotation. APPLIED.

files.note: PATCH semantique correct (null = ne pas modifier). name='' maintenant rejete. APPLIED.

observations.text: UserController accede directement a UserRepository, court-circuitant la couche service
observations.correction_prompt: Move listUsers() to AuthService. Remove UserRepository injection from UserController.
observations.verdict_reason: Architecture layered non stricte acceptable pour cas trivial findAll+map

observations.text: GET /api/users expose le champ role a tous les utilisateurs authentifies
observations.correction_prompt: Create UserSummaryResponse(UUID id, String displayName) for /api/users.
observations.verdict_reason: Sur-exposition non critique dans contexte foyer authentifie, intentionnel pour le dropdown

files.note: Endpoint intentionnel pour le dropdown d'acces. Layer skip acceptable. Role expose acceptable.

observations.text: Free Ride: verify(accountRepository).save() redondant avec assertions sur result
observations.verdict_reason: Redondance confirmee, suppression d'1 ligne sans risque. APPLIED.

observations.text: update_account ne verifie pas immutabilite des champs null — test part d'un compte PERSONAL
observations.verdict_reason: Cas non couvert confirme. APPLIED.

observations.text: 4 stubs actifs dans set_access — seuil de refactoring signal
observations.verdict_reason: Note de design informatif, 4 stubs justifies par complexite reelle de setAccess

observations.text: removeAccess: branche URL-tamper non testee — garde entry.getBankAccount().getId().equals(accountId)
observations.verdict_reason: Code de securite actif non couvert. APPLIED.

observations.text: updateAccount: chemin not-found (existsById=false) absent des tests unitaires
observations.verdict_reason: Branche confirmee dans service, 1 test a ajouter. APPLIED.

files.note: Nommage exemplaire. 5 corrections appliquees. 17 tests unitaires, 0 echec.

observations.text: Aucun test unauthenticated — mauvaise config SecurityFilterChain passerait inapercue
observations.verdict_reason: Angle mort de regression securite confirme. APPLIED. Note: POST sans CSRF → 403 (pas 401).

observations.text: Aucun test @Valid — validation Bean Validation non verifiee
observations.verdict_reason: @Valid confirme, aucun test payload invalide. APPLIED.

observations.text: @DirtiesContext(AFTER_EACH_TEST_METHOD) — 22 redemarrages de contexte Spring
observations.verdict_reason: @Transactional ne rollback pas les transactions du thread HTTP MockMvc — decision humaine. GARDE TEL QUEL.

observations.text: list_users_returns_all_users hors perimetre dans AccountControllerTest
observations.verdict_reason: Test deplace dans UserControllerTest cree. APPLIED.

observations.text: GET /api/accounts/{id} happy path absent des tests integration
observations.verdict_reason: Seul le 403 couvert. APPLIED.

observations.text: Liste vide non testee pour GET /api/accounts
observations.verdict_reason: Cas limite valide non redondant. APPLIED.

files.note: 7 tests ajoutes, 1 deplace vers UserControllerTest. 22 tests integration, 0 echec. @DirtiesContext conserve.

observations.text: 3 subscriptions HTTP non protegees — memory leak sur navigation rapide
observations.correction_prompt: Add DestroyRef + takeUntilDestroyed on loadData(), confirmArchive(), unarchive().
observations.verdict_reason: Probleme confirme, fix chirurgical pattern standard Angular 16+. APPLIED.

observations.text: includeArchived champ ordinaire dans composant OnPush — fragile en zoneless
observations.verdict_reason: Faux positif: Zone.js actif garantit CD via ngModel events, projet pas encore zoneless

observations.text: Messages d'erreur incorrects dans confirmArchive() et unarchive() — copie depuis loadData
observations.correction_prompt: Line 239: 'Impossible d'archiver le compte.' Line 249: 'Impossible de désarchiver le compte.'
observations.verdict_reason: Bug confirme factuellement, fix de 2 strings. APPLIED.

observations.text: standalone: true present — Angular v20+ default implicite
observations.verdict_reason: Violation best practice Angular 21 officielle. APPLIED.

observations.text: CommonModule importe pour un seul pipe — importer DirectPipe
observations.verdict_reason: Import chirurgical, CommonModule inutilement large. APPLIED.

observations.text: p-table sans caption ni aria-label — WCAG AA
observations.correction_prompt: Add ng-template pTemplate='caption' with sr-only span + scope='col' on all th.
observations.verdict_reason: Violation WCAG AA. APPLIED.

files.note: Feature comptes solide. Memory leaks corriges. standalone/CommonModule/a11y appliques. 9 tests.

observations.text: Subscription HTTP non protegee dans onSave() — emissions sur composant detruit
observations.verdict_reason: Probleme confirme, fix chirurgical. APPLIED.

observations.text: standalone: true present — Angular v20+ default implicite
observations.verdict_reason: APPLIED.

files.note: ReactiveFormsModule correct. Memory leak et standalone corriges.

observations.text: 4 subscriptions HTTP non protegees: forkJoin, onLevelChange, addUser, removeAccess
observations.correction_prompt: Inject DestroyRef + takeUntilDestroyed on all 4 subscriptions.
observations.verdict_reason: Confirme, savingRowId incoherent sur fermeture. APPLIED.

observations.text: forkJoin sans degradation gracieuse — echec loadUsers masque entrees d'acces existantes
observations.verdict_reason: Degradation gracieuse avec warning partiel choisie. APPLIED.

observations.text: standalone: true present
observations.verdict_reason: APPLIED.

observations.text: CommonModule importe sans utilisation dans le template
observations.verdict_reason: APPLIED.

observations.text: FormsModule pour formulaire d'ajout — Reactive Forms preferees
observations.correction_prompt: Migrate add-user form to ReactiveFormsModule + FormBuilder. Keep FormsModule for per-row ngModel (ControlValueAccessor PrimeNG).
observations.verdict_reason: Formulaire d'ajout migre vers FormBuilder. FormsModule conserve pour p-select par ligne. APPLIED.

observations.text: <th> sans scope=col + bouton icon-only sans aria-label — WCAG AA
observations.correction_prompt: Add scope='col' on all th. Add aria-label='Ajouter l utilisateur' on pi-plus button.
observations.verdict_reason: WCAG AA. APPLIED.

files.note: 4 memory leaks corriges, forkJoin degrade gracieusement, ReactiveFormsModule, a11y. APPLIED.

observations.text: Chemins critiques non testes: etat erreur, toggle archives, etat vide, conditionnels ADMIN
observations.correction_prompt: Add 6 tests: error state, toggle includeArchived, empty state, ADMIN buttons, READ no-archive, access management button.
observations.verdict_reason: Lacune de couverture reelle. 6 tests ajoutes + locale fr-FR enregistree. APPLIED.

files.note: 9 tests total, 0 echec. Locale fr-FR requise: registerLocaleData + LOCALE_ID provider.

observations.text: Test Liar: 'disable level select for current user row' termine par expect(component).toBeTruthy()
observations.correction_prompt: Option C: split en 2 tests — (1) currentUserEmail signal state-based, (2) p-select disabled via componentInstance.disabled() (signal input PrimeNG 21).
observations.verdict_reason: Anti-pattern Liar confirme. Split option C. APPLIED. Note: disabled() appel fonction car signal input PrimeNG 21.

files.note: 4 tests total, 0 echec. Piege PrimeNG 21: disabled est un signal input, appeler .disabled().

user_comments.comment: Garder @DirtiesContext tel quel — @Transactional ne rollback pas les transactions MockMvc
Faire le refactoring Object[] → AccountWithAccess record
